purpose: Governed Microsoft Forms front doors for intake, support, feedback, and team learning. Forms collect structured signals; Lists remain the operating state.

governance.initialSharing: Internal-only until Stage 7 external Forms collection is explicitly approved.
governance.externalSharingDecision: Allow unauthenticated external response links only for named public/client-facing forms after Stage 7 review.
governance.phishingProtection: Keep Microsoft Forms phishing protection enabled.
governance.responseStorage: Use Power Automate to copy responses into Microsoft Lists. Do not rely on manually opened Excel workbooks as the operating record.
governance.approvalGate: Any form that collects client data, partner data, testimonials, sensitive business information, or public responses requires Adam approval before link distribution.

forms.title: Guided AI Labs - Discovery Intake
forms.audience: Prospective clients, partners, and business owners
forms.stage: Stage 6 now; external link gated by Stage 7
forms.sharing: External response link after Stage 7 approval; otherwise internal test only
forms.responseSetting: Collect name/email when authenticated; ask for name/email explicitly when public
forms.plannerRule: Create a Planner task only when urgency is high, requested timeline is within 30 days, or Adam marks follow-up required.
forms.teamsNotification: Post a short notice to the Intake channel when a response is copied into the Intake Register.

questions.label: What are you trying to improve or build?
Which kind of signal is this?
May we contact you about this request?

forms.title: Change Leadership Tools - Support Request
forms.audience: Change Leadership Tools users and buyers
forms.stage: Stage 6 now; external link gated by Stage 7
forms.sharing: External response link after Stage 7 approval; otherwise internal test only
forms.responseSetting: Ask for name/email explicitly so support can respond even when the form is public.
forms.plannerRule: Create a Planner task for Blocking/High severity or unresolved access/payment issues.
forms.teamsNotification: Post a short notice to the Intake channel or future Support channel when severity is High or Blocking.

questions.label: What outcome are you looking for?

forms.title: Guided AI Labs - Session Feedback
forms.stage: Stage 6 now; client use gated by Stage 7
forms.sharing: Specific client/team link after approval; avoid broad public links for delivery feedback.
forms.responseSetting: Use authenticated links for internal/team feedback and named links for client delivery where practical.
forms.plannerRule: Create a Planner task only for low scores, explicit follow-up requests, or reusable-method candidates.
forms.teamsNotification: Post a short notice to Methods and IP or Intake only when follow-up is required.

forms.title: Guided AI Labs - Team Retrospective
forms.audience: Internal team and future business partners
forms.stage: Stage 6 internal now; partner use after Stage 7 guest/sharing decision
forms.sharing: Internal only until partner onboarding governance is approved.
forms.plannerRule: Create Planner tasks only for committed improvements with an owner.
forms.teamsNotification: Post decision candidates to the Agent Setup or Methods and IP channel for Adam review.

questions.label: Is this a decision, task, or idea?
Who should own the next step?

flowPattern: Microsoft Forms - When a new response is submitted
SharePoint - Create item in target Microsoft List
Planner - Create task only when the condition is true
Microsoft Teams - Post message only for meaningful notifications
SharePoint - Update created List item with PlannerTaskUrl when a task was created
